frontmatter.description: A metric or whole metric pipeline has stopped reporting for longer than the alert window

signature.embedding_seed: metrics stopped flowing scraping gap absent timeseries

body:
## When this fires
A metric the team relies on has been absent for more than 5 minutes. Causes split between the producer (label changed, scrape endpoint moved, exporter crashed) and the collector (agent down, pipeline backed up).

## Playbook
1. Read scrape-target-status to see whether the producer is reachable.
2. Pull agent-pod-events for monitoring-namespace failures.
3. Inspect recent-deploys-svc for label or path renames that broke the scrape.
